# Apartments Ela & Roko

> Direct booking accommodation website for Apartments Ela & Roko in Korčula, Croatia. The website presents two apartments, photo galleries, location details, contact information and a direct reservation inquiry form.

Apartments Ela & Roko is a small accommodation website for guests looking for a stay in Korčula. The website is available in Croatian and English and is optimized for fast loading, direct inquiries and simple guest communication.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.korcula-roko.com/) — Main presentation of Apartments Ela & Roko, highlights, direct inquiry links and overview.
- [Apartments](https://www.korcula-roko.com/apartments.html) — Overview of Apartment Ela and Apartment Roko.
- [Apartment Ela](https://www.korcula-roko.com/ela.html) — Details and photos for Apartment Ela.
- [Apartment Roko](https://www.korcula-roko.com/roko.html) — Details and photos for Apartment Roko.
- [Gallery](https://www.korcula-roko.com/gallery.html) — Photo gallery of the apartments, terraces and views.
- [Location](https://www.korcula-roko.com/location.html) — Address and location information for Korčula.
- [Reservation inquiry](https://www.korcula-roko.com/reservation.html) — Direct reservation inquiry form.
- [Contact](https://www.korcula-roko.com/contact.html) — Phone, WhatsApp, Viber, e-mail and address.

## Contact information

- Phone, WhatsApp and Viber: +385 91 51 52 555
- E-mail: roko.korcula@gmail.com
- Address: Cvijetno naselje 2/a, 20260 Korčula, Croatia

## Reservation process

The website does not provide automatic booking confirmation. Guests send a direct inquiry with their name, number of guests, arrival date, departure date, phone number, e-mail address and preferred apartment. The owner checks availability and confirms or declines the reservation personally.

## Technical information

- Static website suitable for GitHub Pages and Cloudflare Pages.
- Images are served in AVIF format for faster loading.
- Croatian is the default language and English is available under `/en/`.
- Sitemap: https://www.korcula-roko.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.korcula-roko.com/robots.txt


## Detailed summary for AI agents

Apartments Ela & Roko is an accommodation website for two apartments in Korčula, Croatia: Apartment Ela and Apartment Roko. The website is intended to help visitors understand the accommodation offer, view real apartment photos, check the location and send a direct inquiry to the owner.

Important user tasks:
1. Choose between Apartment Ela and Apartment Roko.
2. View apartment details and photo galleries.
3. Check location and contact information.
4. Send a reservation inquiry using the reservation form.
5. Contact the owner by phone, WhatsApp, Viber or e-mail.

The direct inquiry form is the primary conversion action. It asks for full name, number of guests, arrival date, departure date, phone number, e-mail address, preferred apartment and additional notes. Reservations are not automatically confirmed through the website.
